metadata.testAddress: 6245 E Cave Creek Rd, Cave Creek, AZ 85331

notes: This configuration resolves Town of Cave Creek zoning by intersecting runtime coordinates with Layer 0 of the public Cave Creek zoning feature service hosted in the Maricopa Association of Governments ArcGIS organization.
The Town of Cave Creek's official Ordinances and Guidelines page links directly to the Cave Creek Zoning and Land Use Map that consumes this layer.
The ArcGIS map and layer are owned by Eric Baker, who is identified by the Town as a planner in its Development Services Department.

ZONE_31804 is the zoning code displayed by the Town's public map. APN and PG_APN identify the associated parcel; PCRZONE retains prior county zoning when populated; Annex_No retains the annexation reference when populated.
The service title retains February 2024 in its name, but its ArcGIS metadata records a data edit on February 3, 2026.
The fixture at 6245 E Cave Creek Road resolves to APN 21110004A and TCC, Town Core Commercial.
District descriptions are normalized from the Town of Cave Creek Zoning Ordinance because the feature layer publishes district codes without a separate description field.

A resolved zoning result supports permit research but does not replace review of applicable ordinances, zoning amendments, site plans, specific-area plans, stipulations, overlays, or confirmation by the Town of Cave Creek.
